evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-25 one more bounded official Maine DHHS/OFI pass across the public district-office stack, DHHS sitemap surfaces, and the live public county workbooks. The district office page at `https://www.maine.gov/dhhs/about/contact/offices` still preserves district office names, office towns and addresses, phones, emails, map shortlinks, and OFI program links, but zero county names, zero county-served labels, and zero service-area fields in public HTML. It also adds cross-program office handoffs such as Bangor long-term-care questions redirecting to Machias, Biddeford long-term-care questions redirecting to Portland, and Farmington long-term-care questions redirecting to Augusta, plus child-support reroutes from Farmington, Fort Kent, Houlton, Skowhegan, and South Paris to other offices. Those office-to-office program referrals still do not name counties, assign towns, or expose service-area boundaries. The OFI contact page still only points back to `District Office locations` and statewide eligibility/help routing. The OFI programs-and-services page stays live but exposes no county or office-assignment metadata. The Offices/Divisions page and Administrative Office Locations page add office and division descriptions plus administrative addresses such as Family Independence in Augusta and Health Insurance Marketplace in Portland, but still no county-served or service-area routing fields. The human-readable DHHS sitemap only reconfirms the same office leaves, while `https://www.maine.gov/dhhs/about/sitemap.xml` and `https://www.maine.gov/dhhs/sitemap.xml` both 404. The representative `Show Map` shortlinks still resolve only to Google Maps address geocodes for `35 Anthony Ave, Augusta, ME 04330` and `19 Maine Ave, Bangor, ME 04401`, adding no county names, no district-office identifiers, and no county-to-office routing fields. Two official public workbook files are live and parse cleanly, but they still do not repair the lane: `May 2026 Summary Counts By County.xlsx` contains a `CountyCounts` sheet with columns like `COUNTY`, `TOTAL COUNT`, and TANF/FS counts, and `May 2026 Summary Counts By County And Town.xlsx` contains only county and town count rows. Neither workbook exposes office names, office identifiers, or service-area bindings. Maine therefore still has official office addresses, cross-program office referrals, and official county-count workbooks without any public county-to-office assignment contract.
